notes: The XMV8280 is the non-Dante variant; the XMV8280-D adds two Dante RJ45 ports (PRIMARY/SECONDARY) replacing or supplementing the YDIF ports. Speaker outputs are described as 'barrier strip x 8 pairs' — these are screw-terminal barrier strips, mapped to euroblock as the closest listed connector. The Remote and Fault Output share a single described Euroblock(3P)x1 entry in Yamaha specs, but the manual shows them as two separate 3-pin Euroblock connectors. AC inlet exact IEC subtype (C14 vs C20) was not confirmed in available sources — IEC (C14) is inferred based on the device's power class and common practice for this amplifier category. Confidence is medium because: speaker output barrier strip is mapped to euroblock (closest available), AC inlet subtype is inferred, and the Remote/Fault connector count is ambiguous in official specs.

ports.name: Analog Input 1
ports.note: 6-pin Euroblock, balanced; carries channels 1–4 (one of two 6P input connectors)

ports.name: Analog Input 2
ports.note: 6-pin Euroblock, balanced; carries channels 5–8 (one of two 6P input connectors)

ports.name: YDIF IN
ports.note: YDIF (Yamaha Digital Interface Format) digital audio input; CAT5e STP straight-through cable required

ports.name: YDIF OUT
ports.note: YDIF digital audio output; supports ring topology up to 8 devices, max 30m between devices

ports.name: Network
ports.note: 100BASE-TX Ethernet for device control/monitoring via computer; CAT5e STP recommended

ports.name: Speaker Out 1
ports.note: Barrier strip screw terminals (one of 8 pairs); supports low-impedance (4/8Ω) and high-impedance (70V/100V) loads

ports.name: Speaker Out 2
ports.note: Barrier strip screw terminals (one of 8 pairs)

ports.name: Speaker Out 3
ports.note: Barrier strip screw terminals (one of 8 pairs)

ports.name: Speaker Out 4
ports.note: Barrier strip screw terminals (one of 8 pairs)

ports.name: Speaker Out 5
ports.note: Barrier strip screw terminals (one of 8 pairs)

ports.name: Speaker Out 6
ports.note: Barrier strip screw terminals (one of 8 pairs)

ports.name: Speaker Out 7
ports.note: Barrier strip screw terminals (one of 8 pairs)

ports.name: Speaker Out 8
ports.note: Barrier strip screw terminals (one of 8 pairs)

ports.name: Remote
ports.note: 3-pin Euroblock (3.5mm pitch); pins: MUTE ALL, STANDBY, GND — for external mute/standby control

ports.name: Fault Output
ports.note: 3-pin Euroblock (3.5mm pitch); relay contact pins: NO, C (Common), NC — rated 1A DC 30V resistive; Yamaha spec lists Remote and Fault Output as a shared Euroblock(3P)x1 connector block

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: AC Inlet; universal input 100V/120V/230–240V 50/60Hz with Power Factor Correction; exact IEC subtype (C14 vs C20) not specified in available documentation — IEC C14 inferred for this power class
